servers.heading: ODK Central servers
servers.description: Connect Form Forge to one or more ODK Central servers to publish drafts and import published forms. This is the only feature that leaves this device — a server is contacted only when you ask.
servers.empty: No servers yet. Add one to start publishing to and importing from ODK Central.
servers.removeConfirm: Remove "{name}"? This deletes the saved connection and its publish history on this device. Forms you already built are not affected.
servers.passwordHint: Your password is encrypted on this device with your vault passphrase before it is stored, and is only ever sent to sign in to this server.
servers.urlInvalid: Enter a valid URL, e.g. https://central.example.org.
servers.urlHttpsRequired: Use https:// for the server URL. Plain http:// is allowed only for localhost.
servers.emailRequired: Enter the email you use to sign in to this server.
servers.passwordRequired: Enter the password for this server.

vault.createIntro: Your ODK Central passwords are encrypted on this device with a passphrase you choose. You enter it once per session before Form Forge contacts a server. The passphrase itself is never stored or sent anywhere — if you forget it, you can reset the vault and re-enter your passwords.
vault.unlockIntro: Enter your vault passphrase to use your saved ODK Central connections this session.
vault.mismatch: The two passphrases do not match.
vault.wrongPassphrase: That passphrase is incorrect. Try again.
vault.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
vault.resetConfirm: Resetting clears every saved ODK Central password on this device and sets a new passphrase. Your server records stay, but you will need to re-enter each password. This cannot be undone.

publish.title: Publish to ODK Central
publish.intro: Publish this form's current draft to an ODK Central project. Its attachments are uploaded with it.
publish.noProjects: No projects are available on this server.
publish.noPermission: You do not have permission to publish to this project.
publish.renameWarning: This form's ID is now "{formId}", which differs from the one you last published. Publishing will create a NEW form on {server} rather than updating the existing one.
publish.warningsIntro: ODK Central accepted the form but reported:
publish.conflict: A form with the ID "{formId}" already exists on {server}. Update its draft instead of creating a new form?
publish.conflictVersion: The version "{version}" has already been published to {server}. Bump the version to publish an update.

import.title: Import from ODK Central
import.intro: Pull a published form and its attachments from an ODK Central project into your library.
import.publishedOnly: Only published forms can be imported. Drafts are not listed.
import.noForms: This project has no published forms.
import.attachmentsPulled: no attachments | 1 attachment imported | {count} attachments imported
import.collisionTitle: A form with this ID already exists
import.collision: Your library already has a form with the ID "{formId}". Import a separate copy, or replace the existing form with the version from Central.
import.replaceConfirm: Replace "{name}" with the version from ODK Central? This overwrites the form and its attachments on this device and cannot be undone. Its publish history is kept.

errors.title: ODK Central error
errors.cors: Could not reach the server. If it is running, your browser may be blocking the request. See the setup guide for how to allow Form Forge to connect to ODK Central.
errors.network: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.auth: Sign-in failed. Check the email and password saved for this server.
errors.notFound: The server could not find what was requested. It may have been removed, or the server URL may be wrong.
errors.http: The server returned an unexpected error. Please try again.
errors.conflict: The server reported a conflict with a form that already exists.

drawer.heading: Central
drawer.unlockIntro: Enter your vault passphrase to use your saved servers.
drawer.createIntro: Choose a passphrase to protect your saved server passwords.
drawer.draftNote: Publishing uploads a draft. Someone reviews and publishes it live in ODK Central.
drawer.noDestinations: This form hasn't been published to any Central destination yet.
drawer.needsPasswordHint: Add this server's password in Settings to publish here.
drawer.checkMatches: Central matches what you last sent.
drawer.checkNeverPublished: Not published on this server yet.
drawer.checkRepresentationDiffers: Central has this form, but its representation may differ.
drawer.checkError: Couldn't reach the server to check.
